expo.name: Reality Hack
expo.description: An AI-driven safe alternate reality game that sends short real-world missions.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Reality Hack uses the camera only when you choose to unlock camera-based immersive missions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Reality Hack uses the microphone only when you choose to unlock audio-based immersive missions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Reality Hack can access selected photos only when you choose to use photo-based immersive missions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Reality Hack may save generated mission artifacts only when you choose to export them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Reality Hack uses your approximate or precise location only to generate safer nearby immersive missions.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Reality Hack can use motion data only for short movement-based immersive missions.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Reality Hack uses your location only to generate safe nearby immersive missions.

plugins.cameraPermission: Reality Hack uses the camera only when you choose camera-based immersive missions.
plugins.microphonePermission: Reality Hack uses the microphone only when you choose audio-based immersive missions.

plugins.photosPermission: Reality Hack can access selected photos only when you choose photo-based immersive missions.
Reality Hack can access selected photos only when you choose photo-based immersive missions.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Reality Hack may save generated mission artifacts only when you choose to export them.
